claim: Model Context Protocol (MCP) standardizes communication between AI agents and external resources/tools by providing a unified interface that applications can implement.
actionable: Adopt MCP in agent applications to enable seamless integration with diverse tools and data sources via a standardized protocol.
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP): The Key To Agentic AI

claim: MCP separates client logic from resource/tool management, allowing multiple tools to be plugged in without modifying the core agent system.
actionable: Design agent architectures with MCP to decouple tool integration from main logic, reducing coupling and increasing modularity.
source_title: Model Context Protocol (MCP): The Key To Agentic AI
